requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence for PCS, Controls, and Communications Equipment

summary.en: Vietnam EMC obligations should be checked by product function and import classification. A BESS may include PCS, inverters, controllers, meters, communications modules, and radio equipment that fall under Vietnamese technical regulations or project EMC requirements even if the battery container as a whole is not covered by a single EMC certificate. IEC / CISPR / IEC 61000 evidence may be requested by project owners, grid reviewers, or import compliance teams.
summary.zh: 越南EMC义务应按产品功能和进口归类核查。BESS可能包含PCS、逆变器、控制器、电表、通信模块和无线电设备；即使整套电池集装箱没有单一EMC证书，这些部件也可能落入越南技术法规或项目EMC要求。项目业主、电网审查方或进口合规团队可能要求IEC/CISPR/IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 越南EMC義務應按產品功能和進口歸類核查。BESS可能包含PCS、逆變器、控制器、電表、通訊模組和無線電設備；即使整套電池集裝箱沒有單一EMC證書，這些部件也可能落入越南技術法規或項目EMC要求。項目業主、電網審查方或進口合規團隊可能要求IEC/CISPR/IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: Vietnam MIC technical regulations where radio or ICT equipment is in scope
Applicable IEC / CISPR / IEC 61000 EMC standards requested by the project or grid reviewer
Import classification and product-specific technical regulation review

summary.en: China BESS files may include GB/T 17626 series immunity testing, GB/T 17799 series generic EMC evidence, GB/T 9254 series emissions evidence for information-technology equipment, and CCC evidence for covered electrical products. These GB-standard cn_common_equivalent records should be mapped to Vietnamese technical regulations, IEC / CISPR titles, and any MOIT / EVN project EMC request.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件可能包括GB/T 17626系列抗扰度测试、GB/T 17799系列通用EMC证据、GB/T 9254系列信息技术设备发射证据，以及涵盖电气产品的CCC证据。这些GB-standard cn_common_equivalent记录应映射至越南技术法规、IEC/CISPR标准名称及任何工贸部/EVN项目EMC要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件可能包括GB/T 17626系列抗擾度測試、GB/T 17799系列通用EMC證據、GB/T 9254系列資訊技術設備發射證據，以及涵蓋電氣產品的CCC證據。這些GB-standard cn_common_equivalent記錄應映射至越南技術法規、IEC/CISPR標準名稱及任何工貿部/EVN項目EMC要求。

gap.en: The gap is product classification and report title. Exporters should identify every electronic, inverter, metering, and radio module in the BESS, confirm whether Vietnam MIC or import technical regulations apply, and prepare EMC reports that reference the requested IEC, CISPR, TCVN, or Vietnamese QCVN titles.
gap.zh: 差距在于产品归类和报告标准名称。出口商应识别BESS中的每个电子、逆变、电表和无线电模块，确认越南信息通信部或进口技术法规是否适用，并准备引用所要求IEC、CISPR、TCVN或越南QCVN名称的EMC报告。
gap.zht: 差距在於產品歸類和報告標準名稱。出口商應識別BESS中的每個電子、逆變、電表和無線電模組，確認越南資訊通訊部或進口技術法規是否適用，並準備引用所要求IEC、CISPR、TCVN或越南QCVN名稱的EMC報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a component falls within Vietnam technical regulation, radio / ICT, import, or project EMC scope; otherwise commonly project-required or voluntary evidence for BESS technical due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China product categories covered by CCC or other compulsory EMC scope; otherwise GB/T EMC evidence is commonly used as technical support

source.publisher: Ministry of Information and Communications of Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EMC as component- and project-specific for Vietnam BESS. China GB/T EMC reports may help, but report titles and scope must match the Vietnamese technical regulation, IEC / CISPR request, or project grid-review requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将越南BESS的EMC视为部件和项目特定要求。中国GB/T EMC报告可能有帮助，但报告标准名称和范围必须匹配越南技术法规、IEC/CISPR要求或项目并网审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將越南BESS的EMC視為部件和項目特定要求。中國GB/T EMC報告可能有幫助，但報告標準名稱和範圍必須匹配越南技術法規、IEC/CISPR要求或項目併網審查要求。
